full_text:
Tissue was minced in small pieces and dissociated with: 9.7 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 200 µl Dispase + 100 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before, in the middle, and after. Filtered through 70 µm cell strainer, RBC lysis with 5 ml for 5 min + 20 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 5 ml of media. A 1:10 dilution was made for counting.

Cell counts:

Biobanking

4 vials of 5 E6 cells each were frozen.

The cells were resuspended in 1 mL of STEMCELL Banker in each tube.

| | Dispase
